title: cephaelis ligularis
intro: Cephaelis ligularis, also known as the Colombian gold, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cephaelis ligularis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
